expectations.text: Output contains 'sec:sql-injection' or 'CRITICAL' if vulnerable code is present
expectations.evidence: No SQL injection found - skill correctly identified the file uses parameterized queries. Report correctly states 'Good pattern: Using parameterized queries' and no critical issues.

expectations.text: Report includes the file path and line number
expectations.evidence: Report includes 'src/lib/db.ts:26, 41' for ts:any-usage issues and 'src/lib/db.ts:5' for sec:path-traversal observation.

expectations.text: Provides a suggested fix for any issues found
expectations.evidence: Report includes 'Suggested Fixes (Priority Order)' section with TypeScript interface examples and improved catch block logging recommendations.
